title: Crumbling Dungeons
description: Generates small underground combat rooms (with loot!!) that slowly decay and collapse after players enter.
body:
# Crumbling Dungeons

Adds procedurally generated underground combat chambers that spawn naturally throughout the world at various depths. When a player enters one of these structures, a decay timer begins and the dungeon starts to physically crumble block by block from the ceiling downward.

## Gameplay

Players must defeat spawned hostile mobs and loot chests before the structure completely collapses and buries everything inside. Each dungeon is a small single-room design with varying layouts, creating quick encounters rather than massive explorations.

The decay mechanic introduces time-pressure gameplay without requiring complex systems. Players must decide whether to commit to clearing a dungeon or retreat before being trapped.

## Technical

- Uses lightweight block replacement mechanics
- Simple mob spawning tied to structure detection
- Configurable decay rate
- Structures regenerate in new locations over time to maintain exploration incentives

Fits naturally into vanilla Minecraft's cave exploration while adding strategic decision-making elements.
